course.user_partitions: [{"id": 1194385713, "name": "Content Groups", "scheme": "cohort", "description": "The groups in this configuration can be mapped to cohorts in the Instructor Dashboard.", "parameters": {}, "groups": [], "active": true, "version": 3}, {"id": 58912316, "name": "Sample Content Experiment", "scheme": "random", "description": "This is just to show people what can be done with this feature.", "parameters": {}, "groups": [{"id": 1363630119, "name": "Sample Group A", "version": 1}, {"id": 1889263613, "name": "Sample Group B", "version": 1}, {"id": 1493797591, "name": "Sample Group C", "version": 1}], "active": true, "version": 3}, {"id": 1868186923, "name": "Emoji Experiment 1", "scheme": "random", "description": "Do more people answer short surveys if the answers are in emoji? Do their responses change?", "parameters": {}, "groups": [{"id": 1454368484, "name": "Even Subsections Get Emoji", "version": 1}, {"id": 1528469042, "name": "Odd Subsections Get Emoji", "version": 1}, {"id": 1296843229, "name": "Everyone Gets Emoji", "version": 1}, {"id": 1516930085, "name": "Just Text", "version": 1}], "active": true, "version": 3}]
